user_message_snippet: I am planning a weekend trip to Kyoto and Osaka with food, transit, and local event questions.

preprocessing.title: Kyoto Osaka Weekend Plan
preprocessing.chat_summary: User is planning a weekend trip to Kyoto and Osaka and asked about food, transit, and local events.

response: For a Kyoto and Osaka weekend, I would split the trip into one culture-heavy day and one food-and-city day. Use Kyoto for temples, quieter neighborhoods, and traditional food, then Osaka for Dotonbori, casual restaurants, and late-night energy. Next, local context would help: check current events, compare stays near transit, and map realistic train routes so the itinerary stays practical.
